message:
test(modes): add 22 tests for terminal mode tracking and bitflag orthogonality (bd-ng3l3)

Cover: Default vs new(), all 12 DEC mode numbers, 12 unrecognized numbers,
ANSI modes (4/20), unrecognized ANSI, accessor toggles (autowrap, cursor_visible,
bracketed_paste, focus_events, sync_output), dec_flags(), idempotency (double
set/clear), orthogonality (DEC↔ANSI isolation, single-bit changes), all modes
simultaneous, mouse mode independence, reset from all-enabled, application cursor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
